category_sources: Official GitHub README describes trash-cli as using the same trashcan as KDE, GNOME, and XFCE from the command line.
source_facts.description says it is a command-line interface to the freedesktop.org trashcan.
docs_sources: Official repository README contains usage, FAQ, installation, and development documentation.
source_facts.homepage points to the official repository.
repo_sources: Official GitHub README describes the project and source installation from that repository.
tags_sources: Official GitHub repository topics include python, linux, and trashcan, and README lists trash-put, trash-empty, trash-list, trash-restore, and trash-rm.
source_facts.description identifies the freedesktop.org trashcan CLI.
